seo.title: Bang! - online card games for multiple players
seo.description: Play Bang!, Prší, and UNO online with friends. Create your own game, choose a character, and enjoy the fun!

Lupa je zapnutá, kliknutím vypnete: Magnifier is on, click to turn off
Zapnout lupu, kliknutím vypnete: Turn on magnifier, click to turn off
Přiblížená karta (kliknutím mimo kartu z: Zoomed card (click outside to close, click on card to turn off magnifier)
Byl jsi odpojen od serveru: You have been disconnected from the server
Zkus znovu načíst stránku a kliknout na: Try reloading the page and clicking 'Return to a game in progress'.
Kód hry musí mít 6 číslic. Pokud si nejs: Game code must be 6 digits. If you're not sure, please check it again. Continue?
LOGIN_POPIS_BEZ_ODKAZU: Welcome to the online multiplayer card engine! Join a game below. If you know how to code, create your own
Vrátit se k rozehrané hře: Return to a game in progress

footer.legal_text: This website is a non-commercial student and personal project. It is not affiliated with the original game publishers and makes no claims to ownership of their intellectual property. BANG!® is a registered trademark of daVinci Editrice S.r.l. (dV Giochi). In the Czech Republic, the game is published by ALBI Česká republika a.s. All copyrights to the card illustrations, names, and game mechanics belong to their respective owners. UNO® is a registered trademark of Mattel, Inc. Third-party icons used: Fire icon created by Freepik - Flaticon. The rest of the game content, website, server, individual plugins, and all code related to this project, including this website, is subject to the license specified in the LICENSE file. All code and content created for this project is the original work of the author unless expressly stated otherwise. By closing the footer or remaining on the page, you confirm that you will not download any images or any other content from this website for any purpose, including personal use, without the express written consent of the copyright holder. For legal matters, use the email prava@honzaa.cz. The project was largely created as a year-long project (IOČ) for the programming subject at Gymnasium, Prague 6, Arabská 14. The website does not use cookies or store personal data in any way. All data is stored only during the time players are connected to the game, or up to 30 minutes thereafter. By using the website, you agree to comply with the principles of decent behavior and the laws of the Czech Republic while connected to a public game.

Pokud se tato obrazovka nezmění během ně: If this screen doesn't change in a few seconds, please check your internet connection and make sure the server is running.
Pokud už ostatní nechtějí hrát a stále s: If others don't want to play anymore and you're still bored, practice your geography skills on the web
Největší online databáze vlajek:: The largest online database of flags:
Smazat hru a začít jinou: Delete and start a new game
Jakou hru začít? Ostatní hráči budou poz: Which game to start? Other players will be invited.
Nelze se vrátit do hry, protože není ulo: Cannot return to game because no token is saved
Nelze provést akci, protože není navázán: Cannot perform action because no connection to server is established.
Nelze provést akci, protože není znám tv: Cannot perform action because your player ID is not known
Byl jsi pozván do jiné hry. Chceš se tam: You have been invited to another game. Do you want to join it?
Hru vyhrál hráč . Gratuluji!: Player {{winner}} has won the game. Congratulations!
Someone has won, it's not known who.
Select the action you want to perform.
Chceš hrát sám zeměpisný kvíz, nebo navš: Do you want to play the geography quiz, or visit the largest database of flags?
